axes.name: silhouette_readability
axes.baseline: single-weight medieval action silhouettes with limited faction distinction
axes.advanced: hero, rival, elite, and boss silhouettes that read immediately at gameplay scale with asymmetry and role-specific profile breaks

axes.name: material_storytelling
axes.baseline: flat armor and cloth treatment with sparse surface storytelling
axes.advanced: layered materials that signal rank, weathering, ritual use, and combat history without collapsing readability

axes.name: animation_density
axes.baseline: limited idle, move, attack, and hit coverage
axes.advanced: expanded anticipation, follow-through, guard states, finishers, and combat recovery frames with clean timing bands

axes.name: environment_depth
axes.baseline: single-plane combat spaces and low parallax contrast
axes.advanced: foreground-midground-backdrop separation with traversal cues, light wells, and combat readability lanes

axes.name: fx_legibility
axes.baseline: generic flashes and trails with little combat taxonomy
axes.advanced: distinct weapon, spell, guard-break, and finisher FX families that communicate outcome before impact resolves

axes.name: ui_authorship
axes.advanced: premium interface systems with authored hierarchy, diegetic ornament restraint, and clean command-state separation

profile.non_copying_rule: Use original authored combinations and generalized advancement deltas only. Do not directly imitate or reproduce any prior asset set.

advancement_summary.to: premium authored asset language with expanded motion, richer materials, clearer combat taxonomy, and stronger environmental depth

designer_components.compiled_prompt: original dark-fantasy knave hero turnaround board with front, side, rear, and three-quarter pose coverage for premium production art, component tags: hero, turnaround, armor, cloth, baseline profile: single-weight medieval action silhouettes with limited faction distinction; flat armor and cloth treatment with sparse surface storytelling, advancement profile: hero, rival, elite, and boss silhouettes that read immediately at gameplay scale with asymmetry and role-specific profile breaks; layered materials that signal rank, weathering, ritual use, and combat history without collapsing readability; premium interface systems with authored hierarchy, diegetic ornament restraint, and clean command-state separation, Design intent: original premium dark-fantasy action asset for a knave prototype, not derivative of any specific existing title, favor authored silhouettes, premium production finish, gameplay readability, restrained ornament, and worldbuilding continuity.

evolution_hooks.stability_rule: never sacrifice silhouette readability for ornament
